data.body: EDITOR ROUND 2 (browser-verified). Joe's review exposed the editor was broken at runtime — I'd shipped browser code I only syntax-checked. Set up Playwright headless-Chromium loop and fixed: panel crash (missing debounce prop), no-edges+single-column (dropped bpmn-auto-layout which emits 0 edges for our IR; rewrote _emit_di into a real layered layout with expanded subprocesses), edits-not-persisting (crash side-effect; now verified persists). Added Action field + real-browser E2E tier so this can't regress. Confirmed: testaroo was lost because saved file == pre-save .bak (edits never registered). Commits a2be0572/2c66b1c7/c4b4cb60. Concurrent grounding job still active in same tree.
